Isaacman believes Pluto should be a planet.

While most surveys indicated a close contest with a slight edge for the BJP, one poll projected a strong win for the TMC.  Both parties expressed confidence in their respective wins.

description: Cricket sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi continues to amaze, with England cricketer Jos Buttler jokingly questioning if the 15-year-old prodigy is 'AI'. Sooryavanshi's witty 'God-gifted' reply to 'AI chip' theories has won hearts.  Buttler lauded his fearless six-hitting against top bowlers, while Sooryavanshi rewrites IPL history, becoming the fastest to 400 runs.

Candace Owens reacts to leak as Charlie Kirk clip sparks concern
description: Candace Owens faced fresh online backlash after a strange Charlie Kirk show clip and a leaked chat screenshot went viral. A controversial line from the chat sparked strong reactions, but Owens said it was taken out of context and meant as a joke. The debate now centers on authenticity, editing, and whether the full story is being shown.

title: Justice dept sues $5B tech firm for excluding Americans from applying to high-paying jobs
description: The US Department of Justice is suing tech firm Cloudera for allegedly discriminating against American job seekers. Prosecutors claim the company created a sham hiring process, favoring temporary visa holders for lucrative roles and actively deterring US workers. This lawsuit highlights the DOJ's commitment to protecting domestic employment opportunities.

title: After two months, Google withdraws from Pentagon's $100m drone contest
description: Google quietly withdrew from a Pentagon competition to build voice-controlled autonomous drone swarms—after initially being selected as a successful submission. The $100 million contest, run by Special Operations Command and the Defense Innovation Unit, seeks technology to direct drone swarms in real-time battlefield scenarios. Google cited "resourcing" issues, but the exit is said to be  followed by an internal ethics review. OpenAI, Palantir, and xAI remain in the running.

title: Jason Whitlock links Russini to NFL coaches in bizarre claim
description: Former FOX Sports Radio host Jason Whitlock linked top NFL reporter Dianna Russini with NFL coaches Mike Vrabel, Mike Tomlin, and Sean McVay. He drew parallels to fast food chains. He referenced an old X post by Steve Levy. Levy praised Samantha Ponder for noticing Russini’s interview success with two NFL coaches during COVID-19 restrictions. Whitlock also recalled a past statement by Dianna Russini. He interpreted it as a confession about her true aspirations.
